'''âf-l-g''' ('''falaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:easternise|easternise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:easternise|easternise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| falaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:falagithi|falagithi]] || [[word:falagiji|falagiji]] || [[word:falagishi|falagishi]] || [[word:falagi|falagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:falaguthuth|falaguthuth]] || [[word:falagujuj|falagujuj]] || [[word:falagushush|falagushush]] || [[word:falag|falag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:falaguthu|falaguthu]] || [[word:falaguju|falaguju]] || [[word:falagushu|falagushu]] || [[word:falagu|falagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:falagufuth|falagufuth]] || [[word:falagufuj|falagufuj]] || [[word:falagufush|falagufush]] || [[word:falaguf|falaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:falagethe|falagethe]] || [[word:falageje|falageje]] || [[word:falageshe|falageshe]] || [[word:falage|falage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:falagothoth|falagothoth]] || [[word:falagojoj|falagojoj]] || [[word:falagoshosh|falagoshosh]] || [[word:falag|falag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:falagotho|falagotho]] || [[word:falagojo|falagojo]] || [[word:falagosho|falagosho]] || [[word:falago|falago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:falagofoth|falagofoth]] || [[word:falagofoj|falagofoj]] || [[word:falagofosh|falagofosh]] || [[word:falagof|falagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:falagĂŠthĂŠ|falagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:falagĂŠjĂŠ|falagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:falagĂŠshĂŠ|falagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:falagĂŠ|falagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:falagathath|falagathath]] || [[word:falagajaj|falagajaj]] || [[word:falagashash|falagashash]] || [[word:falag|falag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:falagatha|falagatha]] || [[word:falagaja|falagaja]] || [[word:falagasha|falagasha]] || [[word:falaga|falaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:falagafath|falagafath]] || [[word:falagafaj|falagafaj]] || [[word:falagafash|falagafash]] || [[word:falagaf|falagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:falagasha|falagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofalagasha|gofalagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifalagasha|gokifalagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:falagnĂŒsha|falagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofalagnknĂŒsha|gofalagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifalagnĂŒsha|gokifalagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:falagshĂ«sha|falagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofalagnkshĂ«sha|gofalagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifalagshĂ«sha|gokifalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:falagrosha|falagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofalagnkrosha|gofalagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifalagrosha|gokifalagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:falagmusha|falagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofalagnkmusha|gofalagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalagmusha|gokifalagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:falagsherasha|falagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofalagnksherasha|gofalagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifalagsherasha|gokifalagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:falagngasha|falagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofalagnkngasha|gofalagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifalagngasha|gokifalagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:falagyasha|falagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofalagnkyasha|gofalagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifalagyasha|gokifalagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:falagyamasha|falagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofalagnkyamasha|gofalagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifalagyamasha|gokifalagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:falagnĂŒshĂ«sha|falagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofalagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofalagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifalagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifalagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:falagnĂŒrosha|falagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofalagnknĂŒrosha|gofalagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifalagnĂŒrosha|gokifalagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falagnĂŒmusha|falagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofalagnknĂŒmusha|gofalagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalagnĂŒmusha|gokifalagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:falagshĂ«nĂŒsha|falagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofalagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofalagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifalagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifalagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:falagshĂ«rosha|falagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofalagnkshĂ«rosha|gofalagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifalagshĂ«rosha|gokifalagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falagshĂ«musha|falagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofalagnkshĂ«musha|gofalagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalagshĂ«musha|gokifalagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:falagronĂŒsha|falagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofalagnkronĂŒsha|gofalagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifalagronĂŒsha|gokifalagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:falagroshĂ«sha|falagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofalagnkroshĂ«sha|gofalagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifalagroshĂ«sha|gokifalagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falagromusha|falagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofalagnkromusha|gofalagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalagromusha|gokifalagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:falagmunĂŒsha|falagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofalagnkmunĂŒsha|gofalagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifalagmunĂŒsha|gokifalagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:falagmushĂ«sha|falagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofalagnkmushĂ«sha|gofalagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifalagmushĂ«sha|gokifalagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:falagmurosha|falagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofalagnkmurosha|gofalagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifalagmurosha|gokifalagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:falag|falag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠg|fĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofalag|hofalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠlĂŠg|hofĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofalag|hohofalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠlĂŠg|hohofĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfalag|nĂŒfalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŒfĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfalag|nĂŒnĂŒfalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfalag|nĂŻfalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŻfĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfalag|nĂŻnĂŻfalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠlĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufalag|lufalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠlĂŠg|lufĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufalag|lulufalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠlĂŠg|lulufĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifalag|lifalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠlĂŠg|lifĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifalag|lilifalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠlĂŠg|lilifĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofalag|kofalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠlĂŠg|kofĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofalag|kokofalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠlĂŠg|kokofĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefalag|kefalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠlĂŠg|kefĂŠlĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefalag|kekefalag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠlĂŠg|kekefĂŠlĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
